title: Argentinian Pineapple Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory stir fry dish blending the flavors of Argentina with the tropical taste of pineapple.

ingredients.name: Argentinian chorizo (or substitute with beef strips)
ingredients.notes: Cooked to an internal temperature of at least 160°F

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the pineapple and stir fry for 2-3 minutes.
Season with soy sauce, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
